Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Test Engineer role at RateS. Your focus on maintaining testing frameworks and improving efficiency through new tools aligns perfectly with my background in software automation.

Currently, I develop core features in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics. I also redesigned our installation process there. It used to take about 2 days for the team to complete. I automated the entire workflow so it now takes only 2 hours. This 85% reduction in deployment time made the system accessible to everyone, not just technical staff.

For my personal projects, I built an automated job search pipeline using n8n and AI agents. I also developed ValoFenua, a full-stack React app that scrapes 1,300 daily listings to provide price estimates. These projects required me to design robust logic and handle complex data, similar to the requirements for tracking quality assurance metrics at RateS.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering in 2026. I'm ready to help RateS maintain its product quality and improve your testing workflows.

Forte dimension automatisation et contrôle machine compatible avec l'expérience chez Exail Robotics
Utilisation de C++ et C# (proche de la stack actuelle)
Localisation cible à Singapour
points_negatifs: Demande des compétences PLC spécifiques (TwinCAT, CoDeSys) que le candidat devra apprendre
Mention d'une disponibilité immédiate préférée
commentaire: Excellent match pour un profil junior. La dimension 'équipement de précision' et 'automatisation' chez AEM résonne parfaitement avec l'expérience d'Aodren chez Exail Robotics.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Software Engineer role at AEM. My experience at EXAIL Robotics working on core systems for robotics and eye-tracking matches your focus on advanced automation and precision equipment.

I currently develop features in C++ and JavaScript within a hardware-software environment. I also redesigned the installation process at my company. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That is an 85% reduction in deployment time. This hands-on experience with equipment control and process optimization is something I want to apply to AEM's software libraries.

On the side, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack platform using React and PostgreSQL. It includes a complex scraper and AI integration. These projects taught me how to manage the full software lifecycle, from customer requirements to deployment, which is a key part of this role.

I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. AEM's focus on complex engineering challenges and high-speed testing technology is exactly the environment where I work best. I look forward to discussing how my background in robotics software can help your team.

Aodren Gloux

stack: Python, Go, Java, SQL, NoSQL, Linux, MCP (Model Context Protocol), AI Agents, LangChain, AutoGen
points_positifs: Mention explicite du développement de services MCP, ce qui correspond exactement aux projets récents du candidat
Forte emphase sur les AI Agents et l'automatisation des workflows R&D
Poste marqué 'Associate', ce qui reste accessible malgré les 3 ans demandés en description
points_negatifs: L'offre préfère 3 à 5 ans d'expérience backend
commentaire: Une opportunité parfaite car elle demande spécifiquement des compétences en MCP (Model Context Protocol) et en AI Agents, deux domaines où Aodren a des projets personnels concrets et avancés.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the AI Software Engineer role at Webot Singapore. I see you are looking for someone to build MCP services and AI agents beyond simple API calls. I recently built a specialized MCP server for my personal automation pipeline, focusing on state management and tool integration.

I developed ValoFenua, a real estate platform for French Polynesia. It uses a daily scraper to collect 1,300+ listings and feeds them into an AI agent that estimates prices based on live market data. I also built a job search pipeline with n8n and AI agents to automate data extraction. These projects taught me how to handle data cleaning and prompt assembly for reliable outputs.

At my current role with EXAIL Robotics, I redesigned the software installation process. It used to take about 2 days to set up. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. I enjoy turning complex manual tasks into efficient, automated workflows.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. I follow Webot's work in R&D efficiency and would love to help scale your AI agent architectures.

Aodren Gloux
